title: proun Announce Debut Album Maybe Luck: Hear “Miracles”
author: Abby Jones

The post proun Announce Debut Album <em>Maybe Luck</em>: Hear “Miracles” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
proun are an Austin trio who put a dreamy, emo-folk spin on classic alternative rock. The band started as the solo project of singer/guitarist Jamie Weed, and after putting out a couple of EPs in the past few years and welcoming bassist Dante Zatto and drummer/engineer Alex Peterson into the fold, their debut album Maybe Luck is coming this June. proun are teasing the record today with its promising lead single "Miracles."

"Miracles," like a lot of the songs on Maybe Luck, reflects on how tumultuous periods of life shape us for better or for worse. The track pairs an emo-tinged melody with a driving guitar jangle that builds into a therapeutic release. Weed explains:

"Miracles" is an homage to people and experiences that may have caused me a great deal of pain in years prior that have since become points of gratitude. Living life and learning things and growing through tough situations that make being a person feel more meaningful. Not being held up by memories but embracing the complex and unique scenarios the world throws at you. I spent a lot of the last few years working on myself and getting help for my PTSD and time and care can really help so much to change perspective.

Listen to "Miracles" and see the full Maybe Luck tracklist below.

TRACKLIST:
01 "Satellite"
02 "Maybe Luck"
03 "Miracles"
04 "Echo"
05 "Out"
06 "Wall"
07 "Coloring Pages"
08 "Stumped"
09 "Dirty"
10 "Routine"

Maybe Luck is out 6/26 via Good English.
